title: Papa sees Joe — the burger graveyard reveal
prompt: Wide shot of @backyard-grill-area, sunny afternoon, viewer-favorite reveal angle. @Papa already CENTER-LEFT at the grill wearing @papas-apron, mid-flip with his spatula, now turning his head sharply over his right shoulder toward the bushes corner because of an off-screen yell. @Joe already CENTER-RIGHT half-tucked into the leafy bushes at the property edge, still holding a hot dog crosswise in his mouth, fluffy chest dramatically smeared with bright red ketchup. Around Joe in the grass: the now-EMPTY @burger-platter tipped sideways, with crumpled paper wrappers scattered, a few stray bun pieces, a tiny smear of ketchup on the ceramic — a comic 'crime scene' of vanished burgers. Papa's eyes track the scene one element at a time — sees the empty platter, sees the wrappers, sees Joe. His jaw drops slowly, spatula drifts down to his side, eyebrows shoot up to his hairline in slow-motion realization. Papa (a long, low, stunned breath): "...the ENTIRE TIME?" He stares wordlessly. Joe stares back, hot dog firmly in mouth, slow innocent blink, perfect criminal poker-face.
